function.name: open_application
function.description: Open an application on the user's computer

application.description: The name of the application: e.g. pavucontrol, brave web browser, alacritty terminal emulator. The provided application should only be a binary, so it should only be one word, never provide more than one word or application with spaces

function.name: display_ledger_file
function.description: display the user's ledger file. Use this before modifying the content of the ledger file.

function.name: create_ledger_entry
function.description: generate a ledger file entry based on the user's current ledger file. This includes a date, description, a debit, and a credit entry

debit_account.description: The name of the account to be debited. E.g. assets:cash, revenues:software, liabilities:creditcard

debit_amount.description: The amount to be debited from the account. This should be a number with up to two decimal places and NO dollar sign. E.g. 800, 57.34, 0.03, 1237.45

credit_account.description: The name of the account to be credited. E.g. assets:cash, revenues:software, liabilities:creditcard. If no account is provided, then default to liabilities:creditcard

credit_amount.description: The amount to be credited from the account. This should be a number with up to two decimal places and NO dollar sign. E.g. 800, 57.34, 0.03, 1237.45

entry_description.description: A description of the entry. E.g. pay rent, dinner with parents, payment from Mary

function.name: set_session_window_pane
function.description: determines what session name, window number, and pane number the user wants to set as their target tmux window

session_name.description: the name of the tmux session

window_number.description: the window number of the tmux session

pane_number.description: the pane number of the tmux session

function.name: talk
function.description: if not an explicit message to change mode or change target tmux pane, and ubix is in scribe mode, pick this tool. The user is dictating and wants this to be injected

speech.description: what the user wants to have dictated
